arts.ttl: Dominik Szoboszlai 'won't answer' Liverpool question anymore as midfielder 'does the dirty job'
arts.sum: Dominik Szoboszlai gave a truthful take on his Liverpool form and the sides chances under new head coach Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Team News: RB Leipzig vs. Liverpool injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between RB Leipzig and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Benitez praises 'fantastic' Jones performance for Liverpool
arts.sum: Watch as former Liverpool and Chelsea manager Rafael Benitez analyses Curtis Jones' match-winning performance during the Reds' 2-1 victory against the Londoners which kept them top of the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Liverpool learn major Bukayo Saka injury update as Mikel Arteta speaks ahead of Arsenal game
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka has missed Arsenal's last two games after picking up an injury for England

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa injury problems explained as Liverpool deal Diogo Jota issue
arts.sum: Arne Slot provides the latest on Federico Chiesa and Diogo Jota, who have both been left at home for Liverpool's Champions League trip to RB Leipzig on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Paul Mullin shows where allegiance lies with honest Wrexham and Liverpool comparison
arts.sum: Paul Mullin has been a key part of Wrexham's rise in recent years and the club's all-time record goalscorer has now admitted that his allegiance to the club is greater than that of boyhood side Liverpool

arts.ttl: VAR's next step to continue key improvement despite Liverpool and Arsenal decisions
arts.sum: VAR has remained a source of controversy this season in the Premier League but PGMOL suggest changes implemented have seen an improvement in using technology for 2024/25

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds suffer Anthony Gordon blow with Newcastle commitment confirmed
arts.sum: Liverpool suffer a major blow in their pursuit of Anthony Gordon, who has put pen to paper on a new long-term contract at Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Liverpool are unable to stay at their usual luxury five-star German hotel for their visit to Leipzig in the Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly been forced to make alternative accommodation arrangement for their trip to Leipzig in the Champions League this week.

arts.ttl: Shaktar Donetsk chief bizarrely compares Mykhailo Mudryk to a FERRARI as he claims Chelsea 'don't know how to drive' the Ukrainian after being left out of their trip to Anfield
arts.sum: The winger arrived at Stamford Bridge in a big-money £88million deal in January 2023 but he has struggled to find consistency in west London.
